sentences.arabic: زُرْتُ الْمَتْحَفَ الْوَطَنِيَّ فِي الْمَدِينَةِ وَقَضَيْتُ فِيهِ ثَلَاثَ سَاعَاتٍ.
sentences.translation: Posjetio sam Narodni muzej u gradu i proveo u njemu tri sata.
sentences.translationEn: I visited the National Museum in the city and spent three hours there.

sentences.arabic: رَأَيْتُ تَحَفًا قَدِيمَةً وَصُوَرًا تَارِيخِيَّةً تَحْكِي تَارِيخَ الْبِلَادِ.
sentences.translation: Vidio sam stare artefakte i historijske fotografije koje govore o historiji te zemlje.
sentences.translationEn: I saw ancient artefacts and historical photographs telling the country's story.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْمَرْشَدُ السِّيَاحِيُّ يَشْرَحُ كُلَّ قِطْعَةٍ بِلُغَةٍ بَسِيطَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Turistički vodič je objašnjavao svaki predmet jednostavnim jezikom.
sentences.translationEn: The tour guide explained each exhibit in simple language.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَيْتُ كِتَابًا عَنِ الْمَتْحَفِ مِنَ الدُّكَّانِ الصَّغِيرِ عِنْدَ الْمَدْخَلِ.
sentences.translation: Kupio sam knjižicu o muzeju u maloj prodavnici kod ulaza.
sentences.translationEn: I bought a book about the museum from the small shop near the entrance.

sentences.arabic: أَنْصَحُ كُلَّ مُسَافِرٍ بِزِيَارَةِ الْمَتَاحِفِ لِفَهْمِ ثَقَافَةِ الْبِلَادِ.
sentences.translation: Svim putnicima preporučujem posjetu muzejima kako bi razumjeli kulturu te zemlje.
sentences.translationEn: I recommend every traveller visit museums to understand the local culture.
